description: User can create a new chat conversation
steps: Navigate to the application home page
Verify landing on the main chat interface
Locate the 'New Chat' button in the sidebar
Verify a new conversation is created with empty message history
Verify conversation appears in the conversations list
Verify welcome screen or empty state is displayed

description: User can send a text message and receive a streaming response
steps: Navigate to an existing or new conversation
Type a test message in the input field
Verify message appears in the chat immediately after sending
Click the send button or press Enter
Verify typing indicator appears while waiting for response
Verify response streams in word by word
Verify final response is fully rendered with markdown
Send a message requesting formatted text
Verify H1 renders as large bold text
Verify H2-H6 render with decreasing sizes
Send message requesting bold, italic, and strikethrough text
Send message with bullet and numbered lists
Verify bullet points render with proper bullets
Verify numbered lists render with sequential numbers
Verify blockquotes render with left border
Verify code blocks render with background color
Verify syntax highlighting is applied correctly
Verify language label appears on code block
Locate copy button on code block
Verify copied confirmation or toast appears
Verify code was copied to clipboard
Send message with inline code like `console.log('hello')`
Verify inline code renders with monospace font
Verify inline code has background color
Verify inline code does not break line flow
Verify message is marked as stopped/partial
Verify input starts at default height
Type a single short line of text
Verify input remains at single line
Type or paste a long paragraph
Verify input field expands vertically to fit content
Verify input does not expand beyond maximum height
Verify scrollbar appears if content exceeds max height

description: Keyboard shortcuts - Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline
steps: Type a message in input field
Verify newline is inserted in message
Verify message is NOT sent yet
Press Enter to send the message with newline

description: Conversation list displays in sidebar grouped by date
steps: Verify sidebar is visible with conversation list
Verify conversations are grouped: Today section
Verify conversations are grouped: Yesterday section
Verify conversations are grouped: Previous 7 Days section
Verify conversations are grouped: Older section
Verify correct conversation count in each section
Click on a conversation in the list
Verify chat area loads that conversation's messages
Verify chat area switches to new conversation
Verify previous conversation state is preserved
Double-click or click edit icon on title
Verify title becomes editable input field
Press Enter or click away to save
Verify title updates to new name
Verify conversation list also shows updated name
Locate a conversation in the sidebar
Right-click or hover for context menu
If confirmed, verify conversation is removed from list

description: Search conversations by title or content
steps: Type search query in search field
Verify all conversations are displayed again
Right-click or hover for context menu
Verify pinned conversation appears at top of list
Verify conversation returns to normal position
Verify conversation is moved to archived state
Verify archived section exists or appears
Verify conversation returns to active list
Verify conversation is nested inside folder
Verify conversation returns to main list
Navigate to a conversation with messages
Verify new conversation has same messages
Verify new conversation has 'Copy of' prefix in name

Verify download begins or modal shows JSON content
Verify downloaded file contains valid JSON
Verify JSON contains all conversation messages
Navigate to a conversation with messages
Verify download begins or modal shows Markdown

Verify project can be selected as active
Open conversation settings or context menu

Verify context window size is displayed for each model

Navigate to conversation with many messages
Verify responses no longer reflect them
Verify response reflects specific system prompt
Verify UI switches to light color scheme
Verify all components use light theme
Verify UI switches to dark color scheme
Verify all components use dark theme
Verify UI remains readable at all sizes
Verify more content is visible without scrolling
Select different code theme (e.g., Monokai, Dracula)
Navigate to conversation with code blocks
Verify code blocks use new theme colors
Set max tokens to low value (e.g., 100)
Verify response is cut off at token limit
Set max tokens to high value
Verify response follows custom system prompt
Verify image preview appears in input area
Verify image is sent to API
Navigate to conversation with image messages
Verify images render correctly in messages
Verify image opens in lightbox or modal
Send a message and receive response
Locate regenerate button on last message
Verify old response is removed or marked
Verify message is updated in chat

description: Artifact panel opens for code artifact
